parts.text: 951 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «تَقُولُ فِي

text: دُبُرِ كُلِّ صَلاَةٍ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِهْدِنِي مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَ أَفِضْ عَلَيَّ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ وَ اُنْشُرْ عَلَيَّ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ وَ أَنْزِلْ عَلَيَّ مِنْ بَرَكَاتِكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.951 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"Say after every prayer:
Allahumma ihdini min ‘indika, wa afid ‘alayya min fadlika, wa unshur ‘alayya min rahmatika, wa anzil ‘alayya min barakatika
‘O’ Allah (swt), guide me from Your side, and bestow upon me from Your bounty, and spread over me from Your mercy, and send down upon me from Your blessings.’"
